properties.remark: DELAYED REPORT. TIME ESTIMATED. A FEW REPORTS OF QUARTER SIZE HAIL IN CLARE. RELAYED FROM 9 AND 10 NEWS.

DELAYED REPORT FROM SATURDAY. WIND DAMAGE INCLUDED ROOF DAMAGE TO A COUPLE OF BARNS, A HOUSE, AND A MOBILE HOME, TREES UPROOTED, TREES SNAPPED OFF. DAMAGE OCCURRED FROM INTERSECTION OF MCCLELLAND AND TAFT ROADS, AND WENT ENE TO GRATIOT/SAGINAW COUNTY BORDER AND BEYOND.
FOUR TREES DOWN IN ELBA TOWNSHIP. TIME ESTIMATED FROM RADAR.
TREE DOWN ON ROAD.
TREE DOWN ON ROAD.

EF-0 LANDSPOUT TORNADO DEVELOPMENT FRIDAY EVENING FROM A WEAK THUNDERSTORM. VIDEO EVIDENCE AND MULTIPLE EYEWITNESS REPORTS. WELL DEFINED NARROW FUNNEL CLOUD EXTENDED FROM THE CLOUD BASE TO THE GROUND. DUST AND ROWS OF PLASTIC MULCH COVER LOFTED FROM A FIELD. NO OTHER DAMAGE REPORTED. TIME AND LOCATION ESTIMATED.
MESONET STATION BSBM4, BIG SABLE POINT.
MESONET STATION BSBM4, BIG SABLE POINT. THE DURATION OF THE MARINE TSTM WIND EVENT WAS 10 MINUTES.

MESONET STATION D2963, WHITEHALL LIGHTHOUSE. THE DURATION OF THE MARINE TSTM WIND EVENT WAS 10 MINUTES.
THUNDERSTORMS WINDS BROKE A HEALTHY MAPLE TREE OFF ITS TRUNK. THE TREE WAS HEALTHY. ALSO POWER LINES DOWN AT PORTER RD. AND LAKE HARBOR ROAD.
MUSKEGON GLERL.
BUOY STATION 45161, MUSKEGON BUOY.
*** 1 FATAL *** LARGE TREE FELL ON A HOME. 72 YEAR OLD MAN WAS KILLED. TIME ESTIMATED.
MULTIPLE TREES DOWN IN THE AREA, SOME ON HOMES AND SOME OVER ROADS. POWER LINES ARE ALSO DOWN.
GUST TO 80 MPH AT 247 AM, AND GUST TO 88 AT 250 AM. MAY HAVE REACHED 103 MPH BEFORE STATION STOPPED REPORTING. SOUTH HIGHLAND ASSOCIATION PERSONAL WEATHER STATION KMIGRAND77 ON THE LAKEFRONT DUNES.
MESONET STATION XGHL, 1 W GRAND HAVEN.
TREES REPORTED TO HAVE BEEN BLOWN DOWN BY THUNDERSTORM WINDS ONTO HOMES IN GRAND HAVEN.
TREES AND POWER LINES DOWN, SOME ROADS ARE BLOCKED.
3 LARGE TREES ARE BLOCKING THE ROAD ON KENOWA AVENUE, SOUTH OF 36TH STREET. KENOWA AVENUE IS CLOSED OFF IN THAT SECTION.
REPORTED AT GRAND VALLEY STATE UNIV-ALLENDALE.
TREES AND POWER LINES HAVE BEEN BLOWN DOWN AROUND THE RIVERTOWN CROSSINGS MALL. SOME ROADS ARE BLOCKED. REPORTED AT RIVERTOWN PARKWAY AND WILSON AVENUE, GRANDVILLE MICHIGAN.
BUOY STATION 45029, PORT SHELDON BUOY.

AT THE ST. PAUL APOSTLE SCHOOL, A LARGE HEALTHY TREE ABOUT 19.3 INCHES IN DIAMETER SPLIT IN HALF FROM A GUST THAT OCCURRED AT APPROXIMATELY 3:25 A.M. WINDS ESTIMATED TO BE NEAR 70 MPH. TWO SMALLER TREES ABOUT 7 INCHES IN DIAMETER CRACKED AT THEIR BASES. MANY OTHER LARGE TREE BRANCHES DOWN.
